description.content: Endpoints for pushing, replacing, and deleting metric groups. Metrics are grouped by job and optional additional labels.

item.name: Prometheus Replace all metrics for a job

request.name: Prometheus Replace all metrics for a job

description.content: Replaces all metrics for the specified job with the metrics in the request body. The entire group of metrics for the job is atomically replaced. Use PUT when you want to fully overwrite the existing metric set for a job.

variable.description: (Required) The job label value for this metric group. This is the primary grouping key for pushed metrics.
(Required) The job label value for this metric group. This is the primary grouping key for pushed metrics.

body.raw:
# HELP batch_job_duration_seconds Duration of a batch job.
# TYPE batch_job_duration_seconds gauge
batch_job_duration_seconds 42.0

response.name: Bad request — invalid metric format or labels

variable.description: (Required) The job label value for this metric group. This is the primary grouping key for pushed metrics.

body.raw:
# HELP batch_job_duration_seconds Duration of a batch job.
# TYPE batch_job_duration_seconds gauge
batch_job_duration_seconds 42.0

item.name: Prometheus Add or update metrics for a job

request.name: Prometheus Add or update metrics for a job

description.content: Adds new metrics for the specified job or updates existing metrics. Unlike PUT, POST only updates the metrics that are present in the request body while leaving other metrics in the group untouched.

variable.description: (Required) The job label value for this metric group. This is the primary grouping key for pushed metrics.
(Required) The job label value for this metric group. This is the primary grouping key for pushed metrics.

response.name: Bad request — invalid metric format or labels

variable.description: (Required) The job label value for this metric group. This is the primary grouping key for pushed metrics.

item.name: Prometheus Delete all metrics for a job

request.name: Prometheus Delete all metrics for a job

description.content: Deletes all metrics for the specified job from the Pushgateway. After deletion, Prometheus will no longer scrape any metrics for this job label combination.

variable.description: (Required) The job label value for this metric group. This is the primary grouping key for pushed metrics.
(Required) The job label value for this metric group. This is the primary grouping key for pushed metrics.

response.name: Bad request — invalid job label value

variable.description: (Required) The job label value for this metric group. This is the primary grouping key for pushed metrics.

item.name: Prometheus Replace metrics for a job with grouping labels

request.name: Prometheus Replace metrics for a job with grouping labels

description.content: Replaces all metrics for the specified job and grouping label combination. Grouping labels are additional key-value pairs appended to the path as alternating label name and value segments (e.g., /metrics/job/myjob/instance/myinstance).

variable.description: (Required) The job label value for this metric group. This is the primary grouping key for pushed metrics.
(Required) Additional grouping labels as alternating label-name/label-value path segments (e.g., instance/host1/datacenter/eu).
(Required) The job label value for this metric group. This is the primary grouping key for pushed metrics.
(Required) Additional grouping labels as alternating label-name/label-value path segments (e.g., instance/host1/datacenter/eu).

response.name: Bad request — invalid metric format or label names

variable.description: (Required) The job label value for this metric group. This is the primary grouping key for pushed metrics.
(Required) Additional grouping labels as alternating label-name/label-value path segments (e.g., instance/host1/datacenter/eu).

item.name: Prometheus Add or update metrics for a job with grouping labels

request.name: Prometheus Add or update metrics for a job with grouping labels

description.content: Adds or updates metrics for the specified job and grouping label combination. Only metrics included in the request body are changed; other metrics in the group are preserved.

variable.description: (Required) The job label value for this metric group. This is the primary grouping key for pushed metrics.
(Required) Additional grouping labels as alternating label-name/label-value path segments (e.g., instance/host1/datacenter/eu).
(Required) The job label value for this metric group. This is the primary grouping key for pushed metrics.
(Required) Additional grouping labels as alternating label-name/label-value path segments (e.g., instance/host1/datacenter/eu).
(Required) The job label value for this metric group. This is the primary grouping key for pushed metrics.
(Required) Additional grouping labels as alternating label-name/label-value path segments (e.g., instance/host1/datacenter/eu).

item.name: Prometheus Delete metrics for a job with grouping labels

request.name: Prometheus Delete metrics for a job with grouping labels

description.content: Deletes all metrics for the specified job and grouping label combination. Only metrics with the exact label set specified in the path are deleted.

variable.description: (Required) The job label value for this metric group. This is the primary grouping key for pushed metrics.
(Required) Additional grouping labels as alternating label-name/label-value path segments (e.g., instance/host1/datacenter/eu).
(Required) The job label value for this metric group. This is the primary grouping key for pushed metrics.
(Required) Additional grouping labels as alternating label-name/label-value path segments (e.g., instance/host1/datacenter/eu).
(Required) The job label value for this metric group. This is the primary grouping key for pushed metrics.
(Required) Additional grouping labels as alternating label-name/label-value path segments (e.g., instance/host1/datacenter/eu).

description.content: Returns all currently stored metric families in JSON format, grouped by job and grouping labels. This endpoint provides a structured view of all metrics available for Prometheus to scrape.

response.name: All pushed metrics returned successfully

description.content: Endpoints for checking Pushgateway health and retrieving build information.
Returns 200 if the Pushgateway is healthy and ready to accept pushed metrics. Used for liveness probes in Kubernetes deployments.
Returns 200 when the Pushgateway is ready to serve traffic. Used for readiness probes in Kubernetes deployments.
Returns build information and runtime status for the Pushgateway server including version, revision, and configuration flags.

The Prometheus Pushgateway API accepts metrics pushed from short-lived batch jobs and ephemeral processes that cannot be scraped by Prometheus directly. Metrics are organized by job label and optional grouping labels. Pushed metrics are exposed via a /metrics endpoint for Prometheus to scrape until explicitly deleted. The Pushgateway supports the Prometheus text exposition format and OpenMetrics format for metric payloads.
